name: primitive.cube
script_excerpt:
import bpy

# Remove any prior "Cube" so the name is clean
existing = bpy.data.objects.get("Cube")
if existing is not None:
    mesh_data = existing.data
    bpy.data.objects.remove(existing, do_unlink=True)
    if mesh_data and mesh_data.users == 0:
        bpy.data.meshes.remove(mesh_data)

# Create the cube — literal primitive, 2 m on each side
bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=2.0, locatio

name: primitive.cuboid
prompt: create a cuboid 2m wide, 1m tall, 0.5m deep, at origin
script_excerpt:
import bpy

# Create the cuboid from a unit cube, then scale to exact dimensions.
bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1.0, location=(0.0, 0.0, 0.0))
obj = bpy.context.active_object
obj.name = "Cuboid"
obj.scale = (2.0, 0.5, 1.0)  # width X, depth Y, height Z
bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(location=False, rotation=False, scale=True)

# Neutral matte material so it reads in Material Preview / Rend

name: primitive.sphere
prompt: add a UV sphere of radius 0.5 m at the origin
script_excerpt:
import bpy

bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_uv_sphere_add(radius=0.5, segments=64, ring_count=32, location=(0, 0, 0))
sphere = bpy.context.active_object
sphere.name = "Sphere"

bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()

mat = bpy.data.materials.new("SphereMat")
mat.use_nodes = True
bsdf = mat.node_tree.nodes["Principled BSDF"]
bsdf.inputs["Base Color"].default_value = (0.7, 0.7, 0.72, 1.0)
bsdf.inputs["Roughness"].de

name: primitive.cylinder
prompt: add a cylinder with radius 0.3m and height 1m
script_excerpt:
import bpy

# Create the cylinder at the spec'd dimensions, base sitting on z=0
bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(radius=0.3, depth=1.0, location=(0, 0, 0.5))
cyl = bpy.context.active_object
cyl.name = "Cylinder"

# Smooth-shade the curved side; bevel softens the top/bottom rims so they
# catch light realistically instead of reading as razor edges.
bpy.ops.object.shade_smooth()
bev = cyl.modifi

name: furniture.chair.low_poly
script_excerpt:
import bpy

# --- Root empty ---
root = bpy.data.objects.new("Chair", None)
bpy.context.collection.objects.link(root)
root.empty_display_type = "PLAIN_AXES"
root.empty_display_size = 0.3

# --- Wood material (low-poly: flat color, no bevel, no subsurf) ---
mat = bpy.data.materials.new("Chair_Wood")
mat.use_nodes = True
bsdf = mat.node_tree.nodes["Principled BSDF"]
bsdf.inputs["Base Color"].defaul
